hooks.statusMessage: Type-checking + unit tests (TS files changed this turn)…
hooks.command: f="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/.typecheck-pending"; [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; rm -f "$f"; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; out=$(npm run typecheck 2>&1) || { printf '%s\n' "$out" | tail -60 >&2; exit 2; }; out=$(npm test 2>&1) || { printf '%s\n' "$out" | tail -80 >&2; exit 2; }
